menu_adv_1_prc: Change firmware region for China (PRC) device
menu_adv_1_row: Change firmware region for Global (ROW) device
menu_adv_3: Patch devinfo/persist to change country code
menu_adv_7: Write Anti-Anti-Rollback patched image to device
menu_main_install_keep_prc: Install Firmware on China (PRC) Device (Keep Data)
menu_main_install_keep_row: Install Firmware on Global (ROW) Device (Keep Data)
menu_main_install_wipe_prc: Install Firmware on China (PRC) Device (Wipe Data)
menu_main_install_wipe_row: Install Firmware on Global (ROW) Device (Wipe Data)
menu_main_rescue: Rescue from Boot Failure After System Update
menu_main_skip_adb_disabled_required: This option is only available when 'Skip ADB' is disabled.
menu_reboot_adb_required: Allow USB debugging to use the options.
menu_root_1_lkm: Dump init_boot.img and vbmeta.img, patch, and flash
menu_root_2_lkm: Patch init_boot.img & vbmeta.img, and flash (from 'image' folder)
menu_settings_preset_1: Install Global Firmware on Chinese Device
menu_settings_preset_2: Install Chinese Firmware on Global Device
